creator: naddy@mips.inka.de
text:
The PC164 won't reboot(8) with a graphics console.  After FreeBSD
halts, there is some kind of register dump and finally

*** Console Stopped because of 660 Machine Check  ***
*** Press HALT Button to return to console !! ***

(HALT doesn't do anything, RESET is required.)

This also happens when you never touch the keyboard and only access
the box over the network.

It reboots just fine with a serial console.
halt(8) is not affected.

Fix: 

None known.
